headlines.description: Brighton held Arsenal to a 1-1 draw at the Emirates on Saturday after Declan Rice was controversially sent off in the second half.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rice red card thwarts Arsenal in draw vs. Brighton

headlines.description: Bryan Mbeumo's brace helped Brentford to a comfortable 3-1 home win over promoted Southampton in the Premier League on Saturday.
Bournemouth scored three late goals to stun Everton 3-2 in the Premier League at Goodison Park and leave the hosts without a point from three matches.
headlines.shortLinkText: Everton stunned by late Bournemouth comeback

headlines.description: Liam Delap's goal was enough to earn Ipswich their first Premier League point of the season, but they had to share the spoils in a 1-1 draw with Fulham.
headlines.shortLinkText: Draw with Fulham sees Ipswich earn first PL point

headlines.description: Aston Villa returned to winning ways in the Premier League as goals by Amadou Onana and Jhon Duran wrapped up a 2-1 victory at Leicester City on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Aston Villa back on track with win at Leicester

headlines.description: Jean-Ricner Bellegarde's stunning strike earned Wolves their first point of the Premier League season with a 1-1 draw at Nottingham Forest on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wolves, Forest draw despite Bellegarde stunner

events.name: Manchester City at West Ham United

headlines.description: Erling Haaland's second straight hat trick propelled Manchester City to a 3-1 win at West Ham, maintaining the champions' perfect start to the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland scores 2nd straight hat trick in City win
